title: AskHN: Using 'claude -p' for running Mr.Jassy - AWS butler agent
abstract: I am trying to setup Mr.Jassy as a Slackbot app. I want Mr. Jassy to be our personal AWS butler. Mr.Jassy has access to AWS resources in read only and can help the team answer questions. The way its setup now is that I run 'claude -p' from inside a lambda and is invoked by slack events. Is
abstract_zh: I am trying to setup Mr.Jassy as a Slackbot app. I want Mr. Jassy to be our personal AWS butler. Mr.Jassy has access to AWS resources in read only and can help the team answer questions. The way its setup now is that I run 'claude -p' from inside a lambda and is invoked by slack events. Is
